states.description: Android app drawer with list of installed apps
Snapseed main/landing screen before a photo is opened
visual_cues: 'Tap anywhere to open a photo' prompt with + icon
resource_hints: Tap anywhere to open a photo

states.description: Dialog to choose export image sizing
visual_cues: Options: Do not resize, 4000 px, 2000 px, 1920 px, 1366 px, 800 px

states.description: Dialog to choose export format and quality
System document/file picker for selecting photo
Snapseed internal gallery showing no media found
visual_cues: 'No media files have been found' message
resource_hints: No media files have been found

states.description: Error dialog: Could not load photo
Snapseed photo editor (after successful photo load) - not observed in data because photo load always failed

strategies.name: OPEN_APP
steps: If not visible, open app drawer via scroll and tap the Snapseed icon
strategies.success_signal: snapseed_main screen shows 'Tap anywhere to open a photo' and OPEN button
strategies.fallback: navigate_home then open_app again; if still fails, scroll app drawer and tap icon directly

strategies.name: ENABLE_DARK_THEME
strategies.success_signal: Dark theme toggle blue/on and UI chrome becomes dark
strategies.fallback: If dropdown doesn't open, retry click on More options

strategies.name: SET_IMAGE_SIZING
steps: Pick desired size (e.g., '2000 px') in dialog
strategies.success_signal: Settings page shows chosen size under Image sizing
strategies.fallback: Reopen Settings and click Image sizing again

strategies.name: SET_FORMAT_QUALITY
strategies.success_signal: Settings page shows chosen format under Format and quality
strategies.fallback: Retry clicking the setting row if dialog doesn't appear

strategies.name: OPEN_PHOTO
steps: Click OPEN or tap anywhere prompt
In system picker choose a photo
strategies.fallback: If Could not load photo appears, dismiss (OK) and choose a different file; if no media, use Gallery > Add folder to include a folder with images

dead_ends.note: Every available Recent image returned 'Could not load photo'; retrying the same or other thumbnails does not succeed. Photo-dependent tasks become infeasible in this environment.
Folders contain only .mp4 files, not images; folder selection does not produce loadable images for Snapseed.
Repeatedly returning to home and reopening Snapseed does not bypass the photo loading error.

categories.name: LAUNCH_APP
categories.precondition: Device idle on a top-level launcher surface
abstract_steps: Invoke a direct app-launch mechanism referencing the target application by its user-visible label
Verify the expected app landing screen is shown
If not shown, access the full app list and select the target application icon
failure_modes: Direct launch no-ops silently when target cannot be resolved
A different application with a similar name is launched instead
verification_checklist: Landing screen of target application visible
Characteristic UI elements of target application detected

categories.name: TOGGLE_SETTING
abstract_steps: Reveal the overflow/options menu from the top-level UI
Navigate to the configuration area
Locate the desired toggle
Tap the toggle to change state
failure_modes: Toggle already in desired state and action has no visible effect
verification_checklist: Toggle visually reflects desired state (on/off indicator)

categories.name: SELECT_FROM_OPTION_LIST
categories.precondition: A configuration row that presents a single-choice dialog is reachable
abstract_steps: Enter the configuration area
Tap the configuration row that presents a choice dialog
Tap the target option
Dismiss dialog if needed
failure_modes: Dialog closes without selection if tap misses
verification_checklist: Configuration row shows the new selected value

categories.name: SELECT_CONTENT_ITEM
categories.precondition: Application requires selecting a piece of external content (e.g., a file/photo) to proceed
abstract_steps: Trigger the content picker from the application
Browse available items or switch source
Choose a candidate item
Wait for the application to load it
failure_modes: No items available in current source
Permission not granted to access storage
verification_checklist: Editor/consumer view of the selected item is presented

categories.name: RECOVER_FROM_BLOCKING_DIALOG
categories.precondition: A modal dialog (error or info) is blocking interaction
abstract_steps: Dismiss the modal via its affirmative/close button
Reassess state
Take an alternative path instead of repeating the exact action
failure_modes: Looping: dismissing and immediately retrying the same failing action
Mistaking modal buttons for other controls

categories.name: ABANDON_TASK_WHEN_BLOCKED
categories.precondition: Repeated alternative attempts fail due to environment-level issue
abstract_steps: Detect a repeating failure signature
Try at least one alternative source/option
If still failing, mark task infeasible rather than loop
failure_modes: False positive marking feasible tasks infeasible too early
verification_checklist: At least one distinct alternative tried
Clear evidence the blocker is environmental, not a UI navigation mistake
